response.body:
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:mes="http://example.com/messages">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <mes:readMessageResponse>
         <mes:content>Hello this is the message content</mes:content>
      </mes:readMessageResponse>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
